历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was approximately 4220 → 4041 → 4965 → 6679 → 11122, with a significant and continuous decline in recent three years. In 2025, the ranking shifted backward by about 4443 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 11122. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 34 in 2021, 34 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 37 in 2024, and 36 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 38, an increase of 2 students (+5.56%) compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 42nd in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable or slightly rising trend in recent years, belonging to the top national finance and economics institutions. The 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to the decline in the admission ranking of Journalism and Communication majors (primarily affecting the Liberal Arts group). In the 2026 reputation data, there is no record for Central University of Finance and Economics. Douyin popularity ranks 97th overall (rated as 'average'), with moderate to low exposure. There is an abnormal admission record in 2023 with low attention, but no clear signal of a major drop. Applied Economics is rated A, Theoretical Economics A-; Statistics corresponds to the first-level discipline of Statistics (the fifth round of evaluation for Central University of Finance and Economics did not show a rating for Statistics, but the university has strong strength in Statistics); Computer Science corresponds to Computer Science and Technology (not individually rated); overall disciplinary strength is outstanding.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Computer Science was 'recommended' but significantly cooled down; Electronic Information/Communication was 'highly recommended' (76.86); Electrical Engineering was 'highly recommended' (74.28); Mathematics/Statistics was 'recommended' (67.03). The Physics Category enrollment majors are mainly popular directions such as Finance, Statistics, Computer Science, and Big Data, with overall high popularity. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Jiangxi Province is 474,900, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 56.4%, approximately 268,000 people, a slight increase from 265,000 in 2025, leading to a minor intensification of competition. 7. [Regional Factor] Central University of Finance and Economics is located in Beijing, with a enrollment proportion in Jiangxi Province of about 2.5%–3.4%, not a local enrollment, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of 5.56% in Physics Category in 2026, a slight increase in the total number of examinees in the province, stable university reputation, and overall high popularity of Physics Category enrollment majors but with some cooling in Computer Science, based on the 2025 baseline of 11122, the ranking is expected to continue to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11543, with a range of 11043–12043.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (11043–12043), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., ≤11043), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Finance and Statistics. If your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (e.g., ≥12043), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options.
